units.lean_file_body:
variable {K : Type*} [Field K]

open PowerSeries

theorem fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff_field (a : PowerSeries K) :
    IsUnit a ↔ constantCoeff a ≠ 0 := by
  rw [fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact IsUnit.ne_zero h
  · intro h
    exact Ne.isUnit h
notes: Uses the prior project theorem fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff (a : PowerSeries K) : IsUnit a ↔ IsUnit (a.constantCoeff).
Over a field K, an element is a unit iff it is nonzero. The forward direction uses IsUnit.ne_zero. The reverse direction uses Ne.isUnit, which constructs a unit from a nonzero element in a field.
The variable command and namespace open are reproduced from visible local file context.
